description: Native tensor-mode integration: first-order Bogoliubov coefficient with physical eta_0
interpretation: Native TEP tensor integration gives r_max = 0.00062566 at k_pivot = 8.7e-06 (analytic est. 0.00446742). For k*eta_0 >> 1, rapid oscillations across the transition suppress tensor production. Result is below BICEP/Keck bound r < 0.036: True.
